form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing sixth behind Sherlock at this track over 1609m in a NW22656L5 on March 16 at $4.29. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Boston Bound at this track over 1609m in a NW17077L5 on March 23 at $3.33. Has the right credentials to take this out.

form.formComment: Seven-year-old gelding showed improvement last time. 3rd (Fr1) over 1609m at this track, beaten 9 m by American Dealer (1:55.10) in NW10000L5 on March 23 at $25.39. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into seventh behind Speaker Of Peace at this track over 1609m in a NW10241L5 on March 16 at $52.28. This is likely to prove too tough.
